Class RegistrableUser

java.lang.Object
main.models.User
main.models.RegistrableUser
Direct Known Subclasses:
Client, Employee
public abstract class RegistrableUser extends User
Base class for users who register additional contact/identification details beyond the common User fields — namely Employee and Client.

Backed by its own registrable_user database record, related to the underlying user record via an is_a graph edge.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    RegistrableUser.Builder<T extends RegistrableUser.Builder<T>>
    Base builder for RegistrableUser subclasses, adding the registrable-specific fields (NIF, phone, address) on top of User.Builder.

    static Map<String,Object>
    toMap(RegistrableUser regUser)
    Converts a registrable user's registrable-specific fields into a map suitable for use as the CONTENT/MERGE payload of a registrable_user table query.

    • toMap

      public static Map<String,Object> toMap(RegistrableUser regUser)
      Converts a registrable user's registrable-specific fields into a map suitable for use as the CONTENT/MERGE payload of a registrable_user table query.
      Parameters:
      regUser - the registrable user to convert
      Returns:
      a map of field names to values for NIF, phone, and address
